hero.question: Will Novak Djokovic be the 2026 Men’s Wimbledon winner?
hero.prob_take: At 7.4%, the market is pricing Djokovic out almost entirely, betting he won't be competitive at 39 years old in 2026 or will retire before then. That's too confident given his history of defying age and the fact that grass remains his best surface, making this a contrarian buy if you believe his body holds up.

daily_take.headline: Djokovic's Wimbledon Odds Just Spiked. Market Pricing in His Mortality.
daily_take.deck: Novak Djokovic's chances at 2026 Wimbledon jumped 3.1 points to 7.4% on $494K volume, a signal that bettors just woke up to reality. He'll be 39, dealing with a surgically-repaired knee, and facing a field that's only gotten younger and hungrier. The market's still overweighting his legacy and underweighting Father Time. Shorts should keep nibbling here.
